value.statement: AI-powered product & app development for real estate, fintech, and ecommerce companies in India
value.unique_value: End-to-end AI app development with deep domain expertise in real estate, fintech, and ecommerce — faster time-to-market, India-first pricing

segments.demographics: Founders / CTOs at proptech startups or mid-size real estate firms, 30-50 yrs, 10-200 employees
segments.psychographics: Wants to digitise property listings, automate lead follow-up, build buyer-facing AI tools; frustrated by generic dev shops with no real estate domain knowledge
pain_points: Dev agencies deliver generic apps with no real estate context
Long build cycles — 6-12 months to MVP
High cost of hiring in-house AI engineers
buying_triggers: Fundraise completed, now need to build fast
Board pressure to show tech differentiation

segments.demographics: VP Product / CTO / Founders at fintech startups — lending, payments, wealth management
segments.psychographics: Needs AI/ML features — fraud detection, credit scoring, document OCR, chatbots — without building an AI team from scratch
pain_points: AI talent is expensive and hard to retain
Integration with legacy banking infrastructure is complex
buying_triggers: RBI/SEBI mandate requiring AI audit trail
Series B milestone — need AI differentiation for next raise

segments.demographics: Co-founders, CTOs, or Head of Tech at D2C / ecommerce brands scaling past ₹10Cr ARR
segments.psychographics: Wants personalisation, AI-driven recommendations, automated inventory and pricing tools to compete with Meesho/Flipkart at smaller scale
pain_points: Shopify/WooCommerce plugins don't scale for custom AI needs
Customer LTV dropping — no personalisation layer
Manual catalogue management eating ops bandwidth
buying_triggers: Scaling past ₹10Cr ARR — need tech moat
Just hired a CTO — looking to upgrade stack
Raised funding, investor pushing for tech differentiation

value.name: Successive Technologies
value.positioning: Full-stack product engineering for startups and enterprises
value.weakness: Less AI-specific, more traditional dev shop

value.name: Appinventiv
value.positioning: Mobile and web app development with AI

value.name: ValueCoders
value.weakness: Staff augmentation model — no product ownership

value.name: Tata Elxsi
value.positioning: Design and technology services including AI
value.weakness: Too big for startups, slow and expensive

value.name: Persistent Systems
value.weakness: Minimum deal size too high for early-stage startups

value.name: AI App Development — Real Estate
value.description: Custom AI-powered apps for proptech: property search, lead scoring, virtual tours, automated valuations

value.name: AI App Development — Fintech
value.description: AI/ML features for fintech: fraud detection, credit scoring, document OCR, AI chatbots, KYC automation

value.name: AI App Development — Ecommerce
value.description: AI personalisation, recommendation engines, dynamic pricing, automated catalogue management for D2C brands

value.name: AI Consulting & MVP Sprint
value.description: 4-8 week sprint to validate AI use case and deliver working MVP — fixed scope, fixed price

value.headline: Ship AI-Powered Apps Faster — Built for India's Real Estate, Fintech & Ecommerce
value.tagline: From Idea to AI Product in 90 Days
key_messages: Deep domain expertise in real estate, fintech, and ecommerce — not a generic dev shop
AI-first approach: every app is designed with ML, automation, and intelligence from day one
India-first pricing with global engineering quality
Fixed-scope sprints so you control cost and timeline
proof_points: AI apps shipped across proptech, lending, and D2C verticals
Experienced with RBI/SEBI compliance constraints in fintech builds
Integration-ready with Razorpay, Setu, Finbox, Shopify ecosystem

objection_handling.too_expensive: Our MVP sprint starts at ₹5L — less than one month of an in-house AI engineer
objection_handling.delivery_risk: Fixed-scope, fixed-price sprints — you approve the spec before we write a line of code
objection_handling.domain_expertise: We've shipped AI products specifically in your vertical — not adapting a generic template

value.evidence: Primary channel for reaching CTOs and Founders in India
Outbound sequences for VP/Director level in fintech and ecommerce
Long-form content on AI use cases in real estate, fintech, ecommerce
Word-of-mouth in startup ecosystem — YC India, Antler, 100X.VC networks
PropTech India, FinTech Festival India, Nasscom Product Conclave

tactics: SEO content on AI use cases
Cold outreach with vertical-specific case study
Reference calls with past clients in same vertical

topics: Lead scoring for real estate brokers
When to build custom AI vs use APIs
Cost of AI app development in India
How to pick an AI development partner

value.summary: Productverse is positioned as a specialist AI app dev shop for India's fastest-growing verticals. Key growth lever is outbound to CTOs/Founders at funded startups in real estate and fintech who need AI differentiation but can't hire an AI team. LinkedIn + targeted email with vertical-specific proof points is the highest-ROI channel.
top_opportunities: Funded proptech startups post-seed (need to build fast, budget available)
Series A fintech companies under RBI/SEBI pressure for AI audit compliance
D2C brands crossing ₹10Cr ARR needing personalisation to reduce CAC
risks: Generic messaging won't differentiate from Appinventiv/Successive — must lead with vertical-specific proof
Long sales cycle (4-8 weeks) — need a low-friction entry offer (MVP sprint)
